Herbal Extracts


Harness the natural power of plants with PureBulk’s Herbal Extracts Collection. Each product is carefully sourced and formulated to provide the benefits of potent herbs without any unnecessary additives. From adaptogens like Ashwagandha to antioxidants like Green Tea Extract, our herbal supplements are designed to support various aspects of wellness, including stress relief, energy enhancement, and immune health. At PureBulk, we prioritize purity and transparency, so you can trust that our herbal extracts deliver the quality and efficacy you expect. Whether you’re exploring natural remedies or complementing your current wellness routine, our Herbal Extracts Collection offers a wide range of solutions to meet your health goals.

OUR STORY

PureBulk was founded in 2008 by Timothy McNulty in Missoula, Montana, beginning with a simple idea: to provide customers with high-quality dietary supplements without the unnecessary fillers, all at an affordable price. The company’s journey started on eBay, where it quickly gained traction among health-conscious consumers.

In 2009, PureBulk moved to Oregon to accommodate its growing demand, but the company soon outgrew its new location. By 2010, PureBulk found its permanent home in Roseburg, Oregon, where it continues to thrive. Today, the company proudly employs over 40 people in the stunning Pacific Northwest, committed to delivering pure, transparent products to customers nationwide.
